task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URL like 's3://my-bucket.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/key'. The function should return just the region code (e.g., 'us-west-2').
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing a principal to read objects from a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket' and list its contents.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs. Instance IDs follow the format 'i-' followed by exactly 17 hexadecimal characters (e.g., 'i-0a1b2c3d4e5f6g7h8').
